top.title: The collateral remainder cap is incorrectly calculated during liquidation
Liquidation doesn't account for penalty when calculating collateral to give, allowing users to profit by borrowing and s
Users won't liquidate positions because the logic used to calculate the liquidator's profit is incorrect
User can evade `liquidation` by depositing the minimum of tokens and gain time to not be liquidated
Withdraw amount returned by `getLiquidityAmountsAndPositions` may be incorrect
